CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, union_value JSON);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER, user_id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL);
SELECT (union_value(order_id := (SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE user_id = u.id LIMIT 1))).order_id FROM users u;
SELECT (union_value(k := (SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = 2))).k, (union_value(k := (SELECT amount FROM orders WHERE user_id = 2))).k;

WITH user_order AS (SELECT u.id, u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id) SELECT (union_value(user_name := (SELECT name FROM user_order WHERE id = 1))).user_name FROM user_order;
SELECT DISTINCT (union_value(k := name)).k FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > 200);
